title: GetClientCompleteInfoResponse
description: Implementation of the 'GetClientCompleteInfoResponse' model. Contains information about the requested client.

Client.description: Contains information about the requested client.

ClientServices.description: Contains information about client pricing options, including activation behavior details. Each item includes ActivationType and CannotPayForClassesBeforeActivation fields to help determine booking eligibility based on the pricing option's activation configuration.

ClientArrivals.description: Contains information about client arrival services.
